evidence-binding: n6-stripeffort aeb421fd3ebc

non_tdd_reason: Mechanical removal of the single top-level `model_reasoning_effort = "..."` line from the 14 base `agents/<role>.toml` × 3 editions = 42 profiles. This is the load-bearing half of #451: a pinned base effort WINS over the parent session (PR #14807), so leaving it in would make the planner's per-node tier inert. Omission is now LEGAL because n4 relaxed validateProfileText (installer + preflight) to accept an absent effort. There is no RED→GREEN unit for "delete a config line"; correctness is the machine-checked invariant below.

verification_tier: regression-green
- Pre-strip: exactly 1 top-level effort line per file across all 42 (asserted before mutation); roles = adversarial-verifier/build-error-resolver/code-architect/code-explorer/code-reviewer/contractor/doc-updater/implementer/issue-scout/knowledge-lookup/planner/security-reviewer/tdd-guide/workflow-planner.
- Post-strip: 0 `model_reasoning_effort` lines remain across all 42; no triple-blank introduced.
- Byte-identity preserved: every base `<role>.toml` triple (#422.1) still github==gitlab==gitea (0 drift).
- validate-script-sync exit 0 (24 byte-identical groups — down 6 from the n5 `-max` triple deletions, the 14 base triples intact + 6 rename-normalized families). A spawned base-role agent now inherits the parent Codex session effort; the planner tier drives it via the dispatch descriptor (n3) + SKILL prose (n9).
